review_title: An app for everyone
description: Despite everything, I love the particularities that exist in Deepl and, it has given me good experiences in writing and translation I want to wish the technical team success for their work and that they go further!
author: Dalmir A.
pros: For this review, I am using Deepl to write the pros I'm not a native speaker I scratch a lot in English so I need to use tools to not get stuck part of my income comes from writing and Deepl is the one I use the most, it suits me perfectly well, I can choose the way it is spoken in other regions the same language, amazing tool.
cons: I think that Deepl's design is amazing, and so they should not limit themselves in their functions, even in the Pro plan they have limitations, I use Grammarly as an example, they can go further otherwise, we will have to go to Grammarly again after using Deepl, but if they put functions that keep us in Deepl it will be great.

review_title: Deeply in love with DeepL Pro
description: Overall good, for me, it's the best on the market at the moment. Excellent experience. I recommend it
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What I like most about DeepL Pro is the accuracy of its translations, it works very well translating from English to Spanish, from Spanish to English, from Spanish to French, from French to English. It is Quick with lots of options for alternative phrases and now the new Deep Write feature is fantastic.
cons: Copy and paste into the mobile phone app is a headache. In addition, the system is ofteb iddle due to too many users.

review_title: If you want to be overpriced, at least be worth it.
description: My subscription is monthly but I use it almost a year. Overall, I was satisfied. During last month's subscription I faced some problems with deepl's translate text. The alternatives do not work properly resulting to waste my time as well as the limit of the characters i have due to my plan pro. So, I emailed them and notified them with my problem. After some emails the result was that ''my issue is not a priority'' and when I asked for at least a compensation, they responded ''Regrettably, we are not able to offer any form of compensation, or goodwill gesture in this case.'' So I don't think it's worth €30,00 per month.
author: Hara T.
pros: It's easy to use and quite accurate. At ''translation text'' there is the option of ''alternatives'' that helps me a lot.
cons: Τheir approach to the problem that arose. I find it really unfair to pay €30,00 per month and due to their faulty product to not meet the expectations they advertise.

review_title: Great quality translation for all uses
description: As someone who does not natively speak the language of the country where I reside, or the job where I work, DeepL Pro has been a lifesaver.
author: Ashish P.
pros: Probably the most accurate and human-sounding machine translation out there. DeepL has really upped the game with its extensive customization options and document translation, allowing me to just use it without worrying about accuracy.
cons: The interface could use some improvement. Other than fewer restrictions on translation, there are no major benefits to going for a pro subscription. The cost of a pro subscription therefore tends to be a bit high for personal use, but not a big concern for work use.

review_title: DeepL Pro review
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: DeepL is great tool for translation. Fast, contextual and reliable. It captures the context which leads to a more precise translation.
cons: It still does not support many languages. Also, some areas are not being translated and need improvement.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good translator at an affordable price.
author: Yazmin Guadalupe S.
pros: The translator allows you to translate in several languages automatically. It offers a translation closer to native languages. Its interface is easy to use. Its cost is acceptable if you use its functions a lot.
cons: To have all the features you have to cover a high cost. For an ordinary user, it is more acceptable to use the free version or a low-cost version.

review_title: A Translation App To Rule Them All
description: I've been stuck with Google Translate and I wasn't sure how else could I bring my learning language approach to the next level until I came across Deepl Pro. I like well their translator can be reshaped to avoid having a single translation.
author: Armando R.
pros: The ability to rephrase sentences and in various tones and how I can toggle the before and after to see what exaclty took place to put into practice. I
cons: Their text to speech feature seems a bit off, it sounds like a robot and I really need to have a more natural voice since I am learning french. Also they are missing out on the Catalan language.

review_title: Good program at the core but got worse overtime. Sometimes horrible. Switching to Trados.
description: Full of glitches and bugs, technically got worse and worse over the years, it is sometime horrible, unprofessional, customer service can't fix a relatively easy problem for months and that is with a Pro Account.
author: Mateusz V.
pros: Artificial Intelligence function, speed, creativity, clicking on words in the translation and being able to choose other ones on the go
cons: Memory doesn't work, simpel option that customer service/IT department wasn't able to fix for months, still faulty

review_title: Deepl Pro - Review
description: I use Deepl Pro since 1.5 years and it's helping me everyday to ensure my understanding of the different language that I use.
author: Sebastien R.
pros: The library of language that you can translate with a lot of strength word, it's useful for everyday. I mainly use French, Swedish, English, and German. Last, I really like the speed of the translation time.
cons: I found some issue when i let the navigator open, sometimes I need to close or completly refresh the navigator to have access to the website.

review_title: An Exceptional Translation Aid with Occasional Bugs
description: DeepL Pro is basically my best friend at work. It’s an essential tool that helps me refine my translations and provides excellent alternatives when I’m stuck. It’s intuitive, and elevates the quality of my work every day.
author: Carla C.
pros: As a freelance translator, DeepL Pro is undoubtedly the best machine translator out there. The free version is impressive, and it’s incredibly easy to use. I especially love the alternatives feature—it always suggests great word options that make fine-tuning translations a breeze.
cons: The biggest downside of DeepL Pro is that the website or server goes down more often than I’d like, which can be frustrating. It also gets a bit buggy from time to time. As someone who relies on it daily for several hours, this can be pretty annoying—especially since I’m paying for the Pro version.

review_title: Literal plus Context
description: It’s fast and easy to use; I speak in English and the french text quickly shows, the click the microphone and hear the french speaker.
author: Russell R.
pros: great voices with vigor and clear enunciation. Especially important for my cochlear implant and bluetooth transfer thru the speech processor.
cons: The context based translation makes it difficult to match french words with english words. I need to know how a frenchman thinks and speaks in a literal translation; after which, I need the context translation.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Multilingual Projects with DeepL Pro
description: DeepL Pro has been a valuable asset to our multilingual project. Its translation quality and speed have significantly boosted our efficiency.
author: Matt H.
pros: Translation Accuracy: Consistently delivers dependable, nuanced translations. File Format Compatibility: Maintains layout and formatting across various document types, ensuring a professional output.
cons: Cost: Can become expensive for high-volume translation needs.
author_profession: Independent Business Analysis and UX consulting

review_title: The best translation application
description: I am very satisfied with the Deepl application!
author: Michelle A.
pros: Saved translations: I press the bookmark to save words and expressions to remember, and create my own vocabulary lists (all languages).
cons: I've been asked several times to log into my account at DeepL.

review_title: Very easy and quick for all translation needs
description: DeepL Pro is a powerful and accurate translation solution for professionals.
author: Marieken V.
pros: Deepl is very easy to use, for both text and documents and has a great (not free) API!
cons: It's sometimes lacking consistent behaviour within the same text or file.

review_title: Trsanslation with privacy
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The system provides privacy which is very critical for official documents. The Translation is way better than other tools and performs a nearly close translation. Document translation is pretty much good with various formats supported. It just does not perform translation of sentences word by word but most of the time translates according to structure of sentence.
cons: Supports multiple languages but still lacks many. Not have a consistent experience in all languages. The dark mode is not available. Even with an Advanced subscription only 20 documents a month. The documents lose their format after translation. The sentence structure is lost after translation for long sentences and makes the sentences seem robotic.

review_title: IN LOVE WITH
description: I have grown dependent on it, even if not working...
author: Tania C.
pros: It is the most useful tool for my everyday work. It lets you choose from synonyms and different kind of expressing a concept / word / phrase. It's loaded with tons of phrases of the economical / legal area.
cons: I dislike a feature that was added in the last months, that when you scroll over a word it turns blue and sometimes it's bothersome. It lacks phrases / expressions / words of the medical area. Greek language doesn't have a glossary yet. We need it! When I work in a particular translation, I would like it to remember how I translate certain words and use these words/phrases.

review_title: The gold standard of machine-based translation
description: Great. I'm an absolute fan for years.
author: Jens Olaf K.
pros: The usefulness of translation results and the processing of additional characters/strings (like from software code). And that I support a company of my home town: Cologne, Germany, is where HQ are located and the company was founded.
cons: There are some features of the Windows desktop app that you can only use when you have a current subscription although the features is in fact free online.

review_title: Awsome product for the money
description: totally, I'm so satisfied with the product and would like to recommend it to anyone who likes professional translation.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love how professionally it translates texts from different languages together but the best feature is absolutely the ability to give a file and request for translation in supported languages.
cons: the number of times we can use the file feature is limited, even on the pro version. if that limitation was at least more like 20 was nicer which currently is only 5 times per month.

review_title: The best ever and accurate translation tool
description: I believe this is the best translation tool in the market with the lowest cost and anyone can approach easily.
author: Thao N.
pros: Translating results fast and accurately. The interfere is user-friendly and easy to alter with different recommended phrases. I am very satisfied with the quality of translation that is better than Google.
cons: Free trial has a limit of word number and it is a bit expensive but there is no student subscription. They also dont have as many languages as Google Translate has.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Translate more accurately with native tones
description: I am satisfied with the number characters offered for free and consider to pay to get more.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The translation quality results better than other applications I've ever tried.
cons: It has a limit language, specifically Asian languages.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: A great way for communication and business
author: Ashish K.
pros: The ease with which the text can be translated into multiple languages including documents.
cons: Formal/Informal translations are available just for paid downloads.

review_title: Deepl
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This is the best software I've seen in translator mode, I really liked the translation of sentences without losing the meaning of the sentences.
cons: This software has difficulty in translating texts with mathematical formulas.

review_title: One of the best translators on the market
author: Kaio César A.
pros: It translates more naturally, has a wide range of words in several languages. And it's very easy to use.
cons: I liked the app, I have nothing to comment on negative aspects.

review_title: Machine translator is shockingly good
author: Andrea L.
pros: The MT is very good for many languages. Sometimes you don't even need to work on it, it is already perfect.
cons: Creative translations do not work out well yet.

review_title: DeepL Pro
author: Joana Taborda A.
pros: The software has a gentle learning curve and is easy to use for small teams.
cons: However, CAT integration can be complicated.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
